---
title: "SOD compiled figure and tables--relative abundance"  
output: html_document  
date: "2024-06-11"
---

```{r setup}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "~/SOD_Microbiome")

library(phyloseq); packageVersion("phyloseq")
library(ggplot2); packageVersion("ggplot2")
library(readr); packageVersion("readr")
library(purrr); packageVersion("purrr")
library(furrr); packageVersion("furrr")
library(dplyr); packageVersion("dplyr")
library(stringr); packageVersion("stringr")
library(metacoder); packageVersion("metacoder")
library(data.table); packageVersion("data.table")
library(Biostrings); packageVersion("Biostrings")
library(vegan);packageVersion("vegan")
library(agricolae);packageVersion("agricolae")
library(magrittr);packageVersion("magrittr")
library(data.table);packageVersion("data.table")
library(cowplot);packageVersion("cowplot")
library(svglite);packageVersion("svglite")
library(RColorBrewer);packageVersion("RColorBrewer")
library(viridis); packageVersion("viridis")
library(scales); packageVersion("scales")
library(forcats); packageVersion("forcats")
library(cowplot); packageVersion("cowplot")
library(grid); packageVersion("grid")
library(gtable); packageVersion("gtable")
library(tidyr); packageVersion("tidyr")

set.seed(1)
```

### Compiled analysis
```{r workflow, include=TRUE}
prepare_phyloseq <- function(ps, rank = "Phylum", group_var,
                             reference_level = NULL, min_prop = 0) {

  # 1) Aggregate to the requested rank and convert to relative abundance
  ps_agg <- tax_glom(ps, taxrank = rank, NArm = TRUE)
  ps_rel <- transform_sample_counts(ps_agg, function(x) x / sum(x))

  # 2) Ensure the 'rank' column is simple character (avoid factor weirdness)
  original_tax_names <- as.character(tax_table(ps_rel)[, rank])
  tax_table(ps_rel)[, rank] <- original_tax_names

  # 3) NO EARLY FILTERING HERE (min_prop ignored intentionally)
  ps_filt <- ps_rel

  # 4) Optional ordering based on the reference level
  if (!is.null(reference_level) && reference_level %in% sample_data(ps_filt)[[group_var]]) {

    # compute group-wise proportions to order taxa for the reference group
    df_temp <- psmelt(ps_rel) %>%
      dplyr::group_by(dplyr::across(all_of(c(group_var, rank)))) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(Mean_Abund = mean(Abundance), .groups = "drop") %>%
      dplyr::group_by(dplyr::across(all_of(group_var))) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(Prop = Mean_Abund / sum(Mean_Abund)) %>%
      dplyr::ungroup()

    current_tax_names <- as.character(tax_table(ps_filt)[, rank])

    ref_props <- df_temp %>%
      dplyr::filter(.data[[group_var]] == reference_level) %>%
      dplyr::arrange(Prop) %>%
      dplyr::select(all_of(rank), Prop)

    if (nrow(ref_props) > 0) {
      ref_taxa_ordered <- ref_props[[rank]]
      other_taxa <- setdiff(unique(original_tax_names), ref_taxa_ordered)
      taxa_order <- c(other_taxa, ref_taxa_ordered)

      otu_order <- character()
      for (taxon in taxa_order) {
        matching_otus <- taxa_names(ps_filt)[which(current_tax_names == taxon)]
        otu_order <- c(otu_order, matching_otus)
      }
      otu_order <- unique(otu_order[!is.na(otu_order)])
      if (length(otu_order) > 0 && length(otu_order) == ntaxa(ps_filt)) {
        ps_filt <- prune_taxa(otu_order, ps_filt)
      }
    }
  }

  return(ps_filt)
}

export_genus_data <- function(ps, group_var, output_file, rank = "Genus") {
  
  ps_agg <- tax_glom(ps, taxrank = rank, NArm = TRUE)
  ps_rel <- transform_sample_counts(ps_agg, function(x) x / sum(x))
  
  all_ranks <- c("Kingdom", "Phylum", "Class", "Order", "Family", "Genus", "Species")
  
  available_ranks <- colnames(tax_table(ps_rel))
  
  rank_index <- which(all_ranks == rank)
  ranks_to_include <- all_ranks[1:rank_index]
  
  ranks_to_include <- ranks_to_include[ranks_to_include %in% available_ranks]
  
  if (length(ranks_to_include) == 0) {
    ranks_to_include <- rank
  }
  
  data_summary <- psmelt(ps_rel) %>%
    group_by(across(all_of(c(group_var, ranks_to_include)))) %>%
    summarise(
      Mean_RelAbund = mean(Abundance),
      SD_RelAbund = sd(Abundance),
      N_Samples = n(),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    group_by(across(all_of(group_var))) %>%
    mutate(Mean_Relative_Abundance = Mean_RelAbund / sum(Mean_RelAbund)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    arrange(across(all_of(group_var)), desc(Mean_Relative_Abundance))
  
  write.csv(data_summary, output_file, row.names = FALSE)
  message("✓ Data exported to: ", output_file)
  message("  Taxonomic ranks included: ", paste(ranks_to_include, collapse = ", "))
  
  return(data_summary)
}

create_relabund_plot <- function(ps, rank = "Phylum", group_var,
                                 reference_level = NULL,
                                 min_prop = 0.01,
                                 collapse_other = TRUE,
                                 other_label = "Other",
                                 det_thresh = 0,          # per-sample presence threshold
                                 output_file = NULL,
                                 output_data_file = NULL,
                                 width = 7.5, height = 8.5, dpi = 300) {

  # --- 1) Prepare: keep ALL taxa here; collapsing handled below ---
  ps_ready <- prepare_phyloseq(ps, rank = rank, group_var = group_var,
                               reference_level = reference_level,
                               min_prop = 0)  # keep-all

  df_plot <- psmelt(ps_ready)

  if (!rank %in% colnames(df_plot)) {
    stop(paste(
      "Rank", rank, "not found. Available columns in psmelt(ps):",
      paste(colnames(df_plot), collapse = ", ")
    ))
  }

  # Canonical order of ranks; we will intersect with what's present
  all_ranks <- c("Kingdom", "Phylum", "Class", "Order", "Family", "Genus", "Species")

  # ---- Build ranks_to_include from what actually exists in df_plot ----
  available_ranks_1 <- intersect(all_ranks, colnames(df_plot))
  rank_index <- match(rank, all_ranks)
  if (is.na(rank_index)) {
    # If 'rank' not in all_ranks, just use the provided 'rank' as-is
    ranks_to_include <- rank
  } else {
    candidate <- all_ranks[1:rank_index]
    ranks_to_include <- intersect(candidate, available_ranks_1)
    if (length(ranks_to_include) == 0) ranks_to_include <- rank
  }

  # --- 2) Decide "small" taxa by group (based on group means) ---
  df_mean_by_group <- df_plot %>%
    dplyr::group_by(dplyr::across(all_of(c(group_var, rank)))) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(mean_ra = mean(Abundance), .groups = "drop") %>%
    dplyr::group_by(dplyr::across(all_of(group_var))) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(prop = mean_ra / sum(mean_ra)) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(is_small = prop < min_prop)

  # --- 3) Relabel small taxa to "Other" at the SAMPLE level ---
  df_plot_flagged <- df_plot %>%
    dplyr::left_join(
      df_mean_by_group %>% dplyr::select(all_of(c(group_var, rank)), is_small),
      by = c(group_var, rank)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(is_small = dplyr::coalesce(is_small, FALSE))

  if (collapse_other && min_prop > 0) {
    df_plot_flagged[[rank]] <- ifelse(df_plot_flagged$is_small, other_label, df_plot_flagged[[rank]])
  }

  # Collapse per sample after relabeling (sum across ASVs that map to same collapsed taxon)
  df_sample_tax <- df_plot_flagged %>%
    dplyr::group_by(Sample, dplyr::across(all_of(c(group_var, rank)))) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(Abundance = sum(Abundance), .groups = "drop")

  # --- 4) Expand to full sample × taxon grid (include zeros) ---
  samples_in_group <- df_sample_tax %>% dplyr::distinct(Sample, .data[[group_var]])
  taxa_levels     <- sort(unique(df_sample_tax[[rank]]), na.last = TRUE)

  df_full <- tidyr::crossing(
      samples_in_group,
      !!rlang::sym(rank) := taxa_levels
    ) %>%
    dplyr::left_join(df_sample_tax,
                     by = c("Sample", group_var, rank)) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Abundance = tidyr::replace_na(Abundance, 0))

  # ---- Rebuild ranks_to_include from what's present NOW (after collapse/expand) ----
  available_ranks_2 <- intersect(all_ranks, colnames(df_full))
  if (!is.na(rank_index)) {
    candidate2 <- all_ranks[1:rank_index]
    ranks_to_include <- intersect(candidate2, available_ranks_2)
    if (length(ranks_to_include) == 0) ranks_to_include <- rank
  } else {
    ranks_to_include <- intersect(rank, colnames(df_full))
    if (length(ranks_to_include) == 0) ranks_to_include <- rank
  }

  # --- 5) Compute group-level statistics (means, SD/SE, prevalence) ---
  df_detailed <- df_full %>%
    dplyr::group_by(dplyr::across(all_of(c(group_var, ranks_to_include)))) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      Mean_Relative_Abundance = mean(Abundance, na.rm = TRUE),
      Standard_Deviation      = sd(Abundance,   na.rm = TRUE),
      Sample_Size             = dplyr::n_distinct(Sample),
      Standard_Error          = dplyr::if_else(Sample_Size > 1,
                                               Standard_Deviation / sqrt(Sample_Size),
                                               NA_real_),
      Prevalence_Percent      = mean(Abundance > det_thresh, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.nan(Mean_Relative_Abundance))

  # Data for plotting
  df_summary <- df_detailed %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(c(group_var, rank, "Mean_Relative_Abundance"))) %>%
    dplyr::rename(Abundance = Mean_Relative_Abundance)

  # --- 6) Order taxa (reference-based or overall) ---
  taxa_names <- unique(df_summary[[rank]])

  if (!is.null(reference_level)) {
    ref_taxa <- df_summary %>%
      dplyr::filter(.data[[group_var]] == reference_level) %>%
      dplyr::arrange(Abundance) %>%
      dplyr::pull(!!rlang::sym(rank)) %>%
      unique()
    taxa_order <- unique(c(setdiff(taxa_names, c(ref_taxa, other_label)), ref_taxa))
    if (other_label %in% taxa_names) taxa_order <- unique(c(taxa_order, other_label))
  } else {
    taxa_order <- df_summary %>%
      dplyr::group_by(.data[[rank]]) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(total = sum(Abundance), .groups = "drop") %>%
      dplyr::arrange(total) %>%
      dplyr::pull(.data[[rank]]) %>%
      unique()
  }

  taxa_order <- unique(taxa_order)
  df_summary[[rank]]  <- factor(df_summary[[rank]], levels = taxa_order)
  df_detailed[[rank]] <- factor(df_detailed[[rank]], levels = taxa_order)

  # --- 7) Plot ---
  n_taxa      <- length(levels(df_summary[[rank]]))
  legend_ncol <- if (rank == "Genus" && n_taxa > 12) 6 else 4
  legend_size <- if (rank == "Genus" && n_taxa > 15) 7 else 9

  p <- ggplot2::ggplot(df_summary, aes(x = .data[[group_var]], y = Abundance, fill = .data[[rank]])) +
    geom_col(color = "black", linewidth = 0.2) +
    scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "H", direction = -1) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1), limits = c(0, 1)) +
    labs(y = "Relative Abundance (%)", x = NULL, fill = rank) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5, size = 10),
      legend.position = "top",
      legend.text = element_text(size = legend_size)
    ) +
    guides(fill = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE, ncol = legend_ncol))

  if (!is.null(output_file)) {
    ggsave(output_file, p, width = width, height = height, dpi = dpi)
  }

  # --- 8) Export table in your column order ---
  stat_cols  <- c("Mean_Relative_Abundance", "Standard_Deviation", "Standard_Error",
                  "Sample_Size", "Prevalence_Percent")
  col_order  <- c(group_var, ranks_to_include, stat_cols)

  data_summary <- df_detailed %>%
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::across(all_of(group_var)),
                   dplyr::desc(Mean_Relative_Abundance)) %>%
    dplyr::select(all_of(col_order))

  if (!is.null(output_data_file)) {
    write.csv(data_summary, output_data_file, row.names = FALSE)
    message("✓ Data exported to: ", output_data_file)
    message("  Taxonomic ranks included: ", paste(ranks_to_include, collapse = ", "))
  }

  return(list(plot = p, data = data_summary, ps = ps_ready))
}
```

### 16S analysis
```{r 16S analysis}
load("Data/16S/filtered_data/sod_5asv_nowildfire.RData")
sod_5asv_16S_nowf.ps <- sod_5asv_nowildfire.ps

sod_5asv_16S_nowf.ps@sam_data$Treatuntreat_EP <- factor(
  sod_5asv_16S_nowf.ps@sam_data$Treatuntreat_EP, 
  levels = c("untreated", "treated"),
  labels = c("Unmitigated", "Mitigated")
)

sod_5asv_16S_nowf.ps@sam_data$YrSinceTrt_BR <- factor(
  sod_5asv_16S_nowf.ps@sam_data$YrSinceTrt_BR,
  levels = c("untreated", "1to2", "3to4", "5to8", "10to12"),
  labels = c("Unmitigated", "1 to 2", "3 to 4", "5 to 8", "10 to 12")
)

result_16S_trt <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_16S_nowf.ps,
  rank = "Phylum",
  group_var = "Treatuntreat_EP",
  reference_level = "Unmitigated",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/16S/relabundance_plot_16S_treatment_phylum_nowildfire.pdf"
)

write.csv(result_16S_trt$data, 
          "Results/16S/relabundance_table_16S_treatment_phylum_nowildfire.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

result_16S_trt_genus <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_16S_nowf.ps,
  rank = "Genus",
  group_var = "Treatuntreat_EP",
  reference_level = "Unmitigated",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/16S/relabundance_plot_16S_treatment_genus_nowildfire.pdf"
)

write.csv(result_16S_trt_genus$data, 
          "Results/16S/relabundance_table_16S_treatment_genus_nowildfire.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

result_16S_yrs <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_16S_nowf.ps,
  rank = "Phylum",
  group_var = "YrSinceTrt_BR",
  reference_level = "Unmitigated",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/16S/relabundance_plot_16S_YrSinceTrtBR_phylum_nowildfire.pdf"
)

write.csv(result_16S_yrs$data,
          "Results/16S/relabundance_table_16S_YrSinceTrtBR_phylum_nowildfire.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)


result_16S_yrsincetrt_genus <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_16S_nowf.ps,
  rank = "Genus",
  group_var = "YrSinceTrt_BR",
  reference_level = "Unmitigated",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/16S/relabundance_plot_16S_YrSinceTrtBR_genus_nowildfire.pdf"
)

write.csv(result_16S_yrsincetrt_genus$data, 
          "Results/16S/relabundance_table_16S_YrSinceTrtBR_genus_nowildfire.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)


load("Data/16S/filtered_data/sod_5asv.RData")
sod_5asv_16S.ps <- sod_5asv.ps

sod_5asv_16S.ps@sam_data$Fire_Mod <- factor(
  sod_5asv_16S.ps@sam_data$Fire_Mod,
  levels = c("untreated", "SODtrt", "wildfire"),
  labels = c("Unmitigated", "Mitigated", "Wildfire")
)

result_16S_fire <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_16S.ps,
  rank = "Phylum",
  group_var = "Fire_Mod",
  reference_level = "Unmitigated",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/16S/relabundance_plot_16S_fire_phylum.pdf"
)

write.csv(result_16S_fire$data, 
          "Results/16S/relabundance_table_16S_fire_phylum.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

result_16S_fire_genus <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_16S.ps,
  rank = "Genus",
  group_var = "Fire_Mod",
  reference_level = "Unmitigated",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/16S/relabundance_plot_16S_fire_genus.pdf"
)

write.csv(result_16S_fire_genus$data, 
          "Results/16S/relabundance_table_16S_fire_genus.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)
```

### ITS analysis
```{r ITS analysis}
load("Data/ITS/filtered_data/sod_5asv_nowildfire.RData")
sod_5asv_ITS_nowf.ps <- sod_5asv_nowildfire.ps

sod_5asv_ITS_nowf.ps@sam_data$Treatuntreat_EP <- factor(
  sod_5asv_ITS_nowf.ps@sam_data$Treatuntreat_EP, 
  levels = c("untreated", "treated"),
  labels = c("Unmitigated", "Mitigated")
)

sod_5asv_ITS_nowf.ps@sam_data$YrSinceTrt_BR <- factor(
  sod_5asv_ITS_nowf.ps@sam_data$YrSinceTrt_BR,
  levels = c("untreated", "1to2", "3to4", "5to8", "10to12"),
  labels = c("Unmitigated", "1 to 2", "3 to 4", "5 to 8", "10 to 12")
)

result_ITS_trt <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_ITS_nowf.ps,
  rank = "Phylum",
  group_var = "Treatuntreat_EP",
  reference_level = "Unmitigated",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/ITS/relabundance_plot_ITS_treatment_phylum_nowildfire.pdf"
)

write.csv(result_ITS_trt$data, 
          "Results/ITS/relabundance_table_ITS_treatment_phylum_nowildfire.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

result_ITS_trt_genus <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_ITS_nowf.ps,
  rank = "Genus",
  group_var = "Treatuntreat_EP",
  reference_level = "Unmitigated",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/ITS/relabundance_plot_ITS_treatment_genus_nowildfire.pdf"
)

write.csv(result_ITS_trt_genus$data, 
          "Results/ITS/relabundance_table_ITS_treatment_genus_nowildfire.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

result_ITS_yrs <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_ITS_nowf.ps,
  rank = "Phylum",
  group_var = "YrSinceTrt_BR",
  reference_level = "Unmitigated",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/ITS/relabundance_plot_ITS_YrSinceTrtBR_phylum_nowildfire.pdf"
)

write.csv(result_ITS_yrs$data,
          "Results/ITS/relabundance_table_ITS_YrSinceTrtBR_phylum_nowildfire.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)


result_ITS_yrsincetrt_genus <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_ITS_nowf.ps,
  rank = "Genus",
  group_var = "YrSinceTrt_BR",
  reference_level = "Unmitigated",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/ITS/relabundance_plot_ITS_YrSinceTrtBR_genus_nowildfire.pdf"
)

write.csv(result_ITS_yrsincetrt_genus$data, 
          "Results/ITS/relabundance_table_ITS_YrSinceTrtBR_genus_nowildfire.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)


load("Data/ITS/filtered_data/sod_5asv.RData")
sod_5asv_ITS.ps <- sod_5asv.ps

sod_5asv_ITS.ps@sam_data$Fire_Mod <- factor(
  sod_5asv_ITS.ps@sam_data$Fire_Mod,
  levels = c("untreated", "SODtrt", "wildfire"),
  labels = c("Unmitigated", "Mitigated", "Wildfire")
)

result_ITS_fire <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_ITS.ps,
  rank = "Phylum",
  group_var = "Fire_Mod",
  reference_level = "Unmitigated",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/ITS/relabundance_plot_ITS_fire_phylum.pdf"
)

write.csv(result_ITS_fire$data, 
          "Results/ITS/relabundance_table_ITS_fire_phylum.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

result_ITS_fire_genus <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_ITS.ps,
  rank = "Genus",
  group_var = "Fire_Mod",
  reference_level = "Unmitigated",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/ITS/relabundance_plot_ITS_fire_genus.pdf"
)

write.csv(result_ITS_fire_genus$data, 
          "Results/ITS/relabundance_table_ITS_fire_genus.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)
```

### RPS10 analysis
```{r rps10 analysis}
load("Data/RPS10/filtered_data/sod_5asv_nowildfire.RData")
sod_5asv_rps10_nowf.ps <- sod_5asv_nowildfire.ps

sod_5asv_rps10_nowf.ps@sam_data$Treatuntreat_EP <- factor(
  sod_5asv_rps10_nowf.ps@sam_data$Treatuntreat_EP, 
  levels = c("untreated", "treated"),
  labels = c("Unmitigated", "Mitigated")
)

sod_5asv_rps10_nowf.ps@sam_data$YrSinceTrt_BR <- factor(
  sod_5asv_rps10_nowf.ps@sam_data$YrSinceTrt_BR,
  levels = c("untreated", "1to2", "3to4", "5to8", "10to12"),
  labels = c("Unmitigated", "1 to 2", "3 to 4", "5 to 8", "10 to 12")
)

# Phylum plots
result_RPS10_trt <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_rps10_nowf.ps,
  rank = "Phylum",
  group_var = "Treatuntreat_EP",
  reference_level = "Unmitigated",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/RPS10/relabundance_plot_RPS10_treatment_phylum_nowildfire.pdf"
)

write.csv(result_RPS10_trt$data, 
          "Results/RPS10/relabundance_table_RPS10_treatment_phylum_nowildfire.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

result_RPS10_yrs <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_rps10_nowf.ps,
  rank = "Phylum",
  group_var = "YrSinceTrt_BR",
  reference_level = "Unmitigated",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/RPS10/relabundance_plot_RPS10_YrSinceTrtBR_phylum_nowildfire.pdf"
)

write.csv(result_RPS10_yrs$data,
          "Results/RPS10/relabundance_table_RPS10_YrSinceTrtBR_phylum_nowildfire.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

# Genus plots for RPS10
result_RPS10_trt_genus <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_rps10_nowf.ps,
  rank = "Genus",
  group_var = "Treatuntreat_EP",
  reference_level = "Unmitigated",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/RPS10/relabundance_plot_RPS10_treatment_genus_nowildfire.pdf"
)

write.csv(result_RPS10_trt_genus$data, 
          "Results/RPS10/relabundance_table_RPS10_treatment_genus_nowildfire.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)


result_RPS10_yrs_genus <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_rps10_nowf.ps,
  rank = "Genus",
  group_var = "YrSinceTrt_BR",
  reference_level = "Unmitigated",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/RPS10/relabundance_plot_RPS10_YrSinceTrtBR_genus_nowildfire.pdf"
)

write.csv(result_RPS10_yrs_genus$data,
          "Results/RPS10/relabundance_table_RPS10_YrSinceTrtBR_genus_nowildfire.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

#Species plots
result_RPS10_trt_species <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_rps10_nowf.ps,
  rank = "Species",
  group_var = "Treatuntreat_EP",
  reference_level = "Unmitigated",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/RPS10/relabundance_plot_RPS10_treatment_species_nowildfire.pdf"
)

write.csv(result_RPS10_trt_species$data, 
          "Results/RPS10/relabundance_table_RPS10_treatment_species_nowildfire.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

result_RPS10_yrs_species <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_rps10_nowf.ps,
  rank = "Species",
  group_var = "YrSinceTrt_BR",
  reference_level = "Unmitigated",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/RPS10/relabundance_plot_RPS10_YrSinceTrtBR_species_nowildfire.pdf"
)

write.csv(result_RPS10_yrs_species$data, 
          "Results/RPS10/relabundance_table_RPS10_YrSinceTrtBR_species_nowildfire.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

load("Data/RPS10/filtered_data/sod_prunereads_5asv.RData")
sod_5asv_rps10.ps <- sod_prunereads_5asv.ps

sod_5asv_rps10.ps@sam_data$Fire_Mod <- factor(
  sod_5asv_rps10.ps@sam_data$Fire_Mod,
  levels = c("untreated", "SODtrt", "wildfire"),
  labels = c("Unmitigated", "Mitigated", "Wildfire")
)

result_RPS10_fire <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_rps10.ps,
  rank = "Phylum",
  group_var = "Fire_Mod",
  reference_level = "Unmitigated",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/RPS10/relabundance_plot_RPS10_fire_phylum.pdf"
)

write.csv(result_RPS10_fire$data, 
          "Results/RPS10/relabundance_table_RPS10_fire_phylum.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

result_RPS10_fire_genus <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_rps10.ps,
  rank = "Genus",
  group_var = "Fire_Mod",
  reference_level = "Unmitigated",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/RPS10/relabundance_plot_RPS10_fire_genus.pdf"
)
result_RPS10_fire_genus 

write.csv(result_RPS10_fire_genus$data, 
          "Results/RPS10/relabundance_table_RPS10_fire_genus.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

result_RPS10_fire_species <- create_relabund_plot(
  ps = sod_5asv_rps10.ps,
  rank = "Species",
  group_var = "Fire_Mod",
  reference_level = "Unmitigated",
  min_prop = 0.01,
  output_file = "Figures/RPS10/relabundance_plot_RPS10_fire_species.pdf"
)
result_RPS10_fire_species

write.csv(result_RPS10_fire_species$data, 
          "Results/RPS10/relabundance_table_RPS10_fire_species.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)
```

# Combined plot
```{r combined plots 2}
combined_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(
  # 16S — Phylum
  result_16S_trt$data %>%
    dplyr::transmute(Dataset = "SOD Mitigation", Barcode = "16S",
                      Factor = Treatuntreat_EP, Taxon = Phylum,
                      Mean_Relative_Abundance),
  result_16S_yrs$data %>%
    dplyr::transmute(Dataset = "Years Since SOD Mitigation", Barcode = "16S",
                      Factor = YrSinceTrt_BR, Taxon = Phylum,
                      Mean_Relative_Abundance),
  result_16S_fire$data %>%
    dplyr::transmute(Dataset = "Chetco Bar Fire", Barcode = "16S",
                      Factor = Fire_Mod, Taxon = Phylum,
                      Mean_Relative_Abundance),

  # ITS — Phylum
  result_ITS_trt$data %>%
    dplyr::transmute(Dataset = "SOD Mitigation", Barcode = "ITS",
                      Factor = Treatuntreat_EP, Taxon = Phylum,
                      Mean_Relative_Abundance),
  result_ITS_yrs$data %>%
    dplyr::transmute(Dataset = "Years Since SOD Mitigation", Barcode = "ITS",
                      Factor = YrSinceTrt_BR, Taxon = Phylum,
                      Mean_Relative_Abundance),
  result_ITS_fire$data %>%
    dplyr::transmute(Dataset = "Chetco Bar Fire", Barcode = "ITS",
                      Factor = Fire_Mod, Taxon = Phylum,
                      Mean_Relative_Abundance),

  # rps10 — Genus
  result_RPS10_trt_genus$data %>%
    dplyr::transmute(Dataset = "SOD Mitigation", Barcode = "rps10",
                      Factor = Treatuntreat_EP, Taxon = Genus,
                      Mean_Relative_Abundance),
  result_RPS10_yrs_genus$data %>%
    dplyr::transmute(Dataset = "Years Since SOD Mitigation", Barcode = "rps10",
                      Factor = YrSinceTrt_BR, Taxon = Genus,
                      Mean_Relative_Abundance),
  result_RPS10_fire_genus$data %>%
    dplyr::transmute(Dataset = "Chetco Bar Fire", Barcode = "rps10",
                      Factor = Fire_Mod, Taxon = Genus,
                      Mean_Relative_Abundance)
)

combined_16S   <- combined_df %>% dplyr::filter(Barcode == "16S")
combined_ITS   <- combined_df %>% dplyr::filter(Barcode == "ITS")
combined_rps10 <- combined_df %>% dplyr::filter(Barcode == "rps10")

plot_combined_facets <- function(df,
                                 rank = "Phylum",
                                 facet_var = "Dataset",
                                 dataset_order = c("SOD Mitigation", "Years Since SOD Mitigation", "Chetco Bar Fire"),
                                 reference_level = "Unmitigated",
                                 collapse_other = FALSE,
                                 min_prop = 0.01,
                                 other_label = "Other",
                                 ncol = 3,
                                 panel_labels = c("A", "B", "C"),
                                 show_ylab = TRUE,
                                 show_strip = TRUE,
                                 custom_taxa_order = NULL,
                                 legend_label = "Phylum") {

  df[[rank]] <- ifelse(
    is.na(df[[rank]]) | df[[rank]] == "" | df[[rank]] == "NA" | grepl("^Unclassified", df[[rank]]),
    other_label, df[[rank]]
  )

  df <- df %>%
    dplyr::group_by(Dataset, Factor, .data[[rank]]) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(Mean_Relative_Abundance = sum(Mean_Relative_Abundance, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    dplyr::group_by(Dataset, Factor) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(Mean_Relative_Abundance = Mean_Relative_Abundance / sum(Mean_Relative_Abundance, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()

  if (collapse_other && min_prop > 0) {
    df <- df %>%
      dplyr::group_by(Dataset, Factor) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(prop = Mean_Relative_Abundance,
                    !!rlang::sym(rank) := dplyr::if_else(prop < min_prop, other_label, .data[[rank]])) %>%
      dplyr::ungroup() %>%
      dplyr::group_by(Dataset, Factor, .data[[rank]]) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(Mean_Relative_Abundance = sum(Mean_Relative_Abundance, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
      dplyr::group_by(Dataset, Factor) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(Mean_Relative_Abundance = Mean_Relative_Abundance / sum(Mean_Relative_Abundance, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
      dplyr::ungroup()
  }

  df <- df %>% dplyr::mutate(Mean_Relative_Abundance = pmax(0, pmin(1, Mean_Relative_Abundance)))

  check_sums <- df %>%
    dplyr::group_by(Dataset, Factor) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(total = sum(Mean_Relative_Abundance), .groups = "drop")

  if (any(abs(check_sums$total - 1.0) > 1e-10 & check_sums$total > 0)) {
    warning("Some groups do not sum to exactly 1.0:")
    print(check_sums %>% dplyr::filter(abs(total - 1.0) > 1e-10 & total > 0))
  }

  df[[facet_var]] <- factor(df[[facet_var]], levels = dataset_order)

  if (!is.null(custom_taxa_order)) {
    ref_order_data <- custom_taxa_order[custom_taxa_order %in% unique(df[[rank]])]
    ref_order_data <- ref_order_data[ref_order_data != other_label]
  } else {
    ref_order_data <- df %>%
      dplyr::filter(Factor == reference_level, .data[[rank]] != other_label, Mean_Relative_Abundance > 0) %>%
      dplyr::group_by(.data[[rank]]) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(total = sum(Mean_Relative_Abundance), .groups = "drop") %>%
      dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(total)) %>%
      dplyr::pull(.data[[rank]])
    if (length(ref_order_data) == 0) {
      ref_order_data <- df %>%
        dplyr::filter(Mean_Relative_Abundance > 0) %>%
        dplyr::group_by(.data[[rank]]) %>%
        dplyr::summarise(total = sum(Mean_Relative_Abundance), .groups = "drop") %>%
        dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(total)) %>%
        dplyr::pull(.data[[rank]])
    }
    ref_order_data <- unique(ref_order_data[ref_order_data != other_label])
  }

  has_other    <- other_label %in% df[[rank]]
  legend_order <- if (has_other) c(ref_order_data, other_label) else ref_order_data
  df[[rank]]   <- factor(df[[rank]], levels = legend_order)

  n_taxa <- length(ref_order_data)
  n_colors_to_generate <- max(n_taxa, 10)

  if (n_taxa <= 10) {
    all_palette_colors <- viridisLite::viridis(n_colors_to_generate, option = "H", direction = -1)
  } else {
    base_colors  <- viridisLite::viridis(10, option = "H", direction = -1)
    extra_colors <- c("#83358F", "#D6B4FC", "#FF8DA1")
    n_extra_needed <- n_taxa - 10
    all_palette_colors <- c(base_colors, extra_colors[seq_len(n_extra_needed)])
  }

  palette_colors <- all_palette_colors[seq_len(length(ref_order_data))]
  palette_colors <- stats::setNames(palette_colors, ref_order_data)
  if (has_other) palette_colors[other_label] <- "#6E6E6E"

  if (!is.factor(df$Factor)) {
    factor_levels <- df %>% dplyr::distinct(Factor) %>% dplyr::pull(Factor)
    df$Factor <- factor(df$Factor, levels = factor_levels)
  }

  ylab_text <- if (show_ylab) "Mean Relative Abundance (%)" else " "

  p <- ggplot2::ggplot(
    df,
    ggplot2::aes(x = Factor, y = Mean_Relative_Abundance, fill = .data[[rank]])
  ) +
    ggplot2::geom_col(color = "black", linewidth = 0.2,
                      position = ggplot2::position_stack(reverse = TRUE), width = 0.7) +
    ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values = palette_colors,
                               breaks = legend_order, limits = legend_order, drop = FALSE) +
    ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
                                limits = c(0, 1), expand = c(0, 0)) +
    ggplot2::scale_x_discrete(drop = TRUE, expand = c(0.02, 0.02)) +
    ggplot2::labs(y = ylab_text, x = NULL, fill = legend_label)

  if (requireNamespace("ggh4x", quietly = TRUE)) {
    p <- p + ggh4x::facet_grid2(
      rows = ggplot2::vars(), cols = ggplot2::vars(!!rlang::sym(facet_var)),
      scales = "free_x", space = "free_x"
    )
  } else {
    p <- p + ggplot2::facet_grid(
      rows = ggplot2::vars(), cols = ggplot2::vars(!!rlang::sym(facet_var)),
      scales = "free_x", space = "free_x"
    )
  }

  p <- p +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    ggplot2::theme(
      axis.text.x   = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 10, margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 0)),
      axis.text.y   = ggplot2::element_text(size = 10),
      axis.title.y  = ggplot2::element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(r = 12)),
      axis.line.x   = ggplot2::element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
      axis.line.y   = ggplot2::element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
      axis.ticks.x  = ggplot2::element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
      axis.ticks.y  = ggplot2::element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
      axis.ticks.length.x = grid::unit(2, "pt"),
      legend.position     = "bottom",
      legend.text         = ggplot2::element_text(size = 8),
      legend.title        = ggplot2::element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"),
      legend.spacing.x    = grid::unit(0.1, "lines"),
      legend.spacing.y    = grid::unit(0.05, "lines"),
      legend.key.size     = grid::unit(0.35, "cm"),
      legend.box.margin   = ggplot2::margin(t = 2, r = 0, b = 0, l = 0),
      strip.text          = if (show_strip) ggplot2::element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", margin = ggplot2::margin(b = 4, t = 2)) else ggplot2::element_blank(),
      strip.background    = ggplot2::element_blank(),  
      panel.spacing.x     = grid::unit(1.2, "lines"), 
      panel.grid          = ggplot2::element_blank(), 
      panel.border        = ggplot2::element_blank(),  
      panel.background    = ggplot2::element_blank(),  
      plot.background     = ggplot2::element_blank(),  
      plot.margin         = ggplot2::margin(t = 3, r = 5, b = 3, l = 5)
    ) +
    ggplot2::guides(fill = ggplot2::guide_legend(ncol = 6, byrow = TRUE, reverse = FALSE))

  return(p)
}

all_16S_phyla <- combined_16S %>% filter(Phylum != "Other") %>% pull(Phylum) %>% unique()
all_ITS_phyla <- combined_ITS %>% filter(Phylum != "Other") %>% pull(Phylum) %>% unique()
all_rps10_genera <- combined_rps10 %>% filter(Genus != "Other") %>% pull(Genus) %>% unique()

taxa_order_16S_ref <- combined_16S %>%
  filter(Factor == "Unmitigated", Phylum != "Other") %>%
  group_by(Phylum) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(Mean_Relative_Abundance), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(total)) %>%
  pull(Phylum)

taxa_order_ITS_ref <- combined_ITS %>%
  filter(Factor == "Unmitigated", Phylum != "Other") %>%
  group_by(Phylum) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(Mean_Relative_Abundance), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(total)) %>%
  pull(Phylum)

taxa_order_RPS10_ref <- combined_rps10 %>%
  filter(Factor == "Unmitigated", Genus != "Other") %>%
  group_by(Genus) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(Mean_Relative_Abundance), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(desc(total)) %>%
  pull(Genus)

taxa_not_in_ref_16S   <- setdiff(all_16S_phyla, taxa_order_16S_ref)
taxa_not_in_ref_ITS   <- setdiff(all_ITS_phyla, taxa_order_ITS_ref)
taxa_not_in_ref_RPS10 <- setdiff(all_rps10_genera, taxa_order_RPS10_ref)

taxa_order_16S  <- c(taxa_order_16S_ref, taxa_not_in_ref_16S)
taxa_order_ITS  <- c(taxa_order_ITS_ref, taxa_not_in_ref_ITS)
taxa_order_RPS10<- c(taxa_order_RPS10_ref, taxa_not_in_ref_RPS10)

p_16S <- plot_combined_facets(
  combined_16S,
  rank = "Taxon",             # we now use the generic name column
  fill_col = "Taxon",         # <— this makes the legend show Phylum NAMES
  reference_level = "Unmitigated",
  panel_labels = c("A","B","C"),
  min_prop = 0.01,
  show_ylab = FALSE, show_strip = TRUE,
  collapse_other = FALSE,
  legend_label = "Phylum"     # correct label for 16S/ITS
)

p_ITS <- plot_combined_facets(
  combined_ITS,
  rank = "Taxon",
  fill_col = "Taxon",         # <— names in legend
  reference_level = "Unmitigated",
  panel_labels = c("D","E","F"),
  min_prop = 0.01,
  show_ylab = TRUE, show_strip = FALSE,
  collapse_other = FALSE,
  legend_label = "Phylum"
)

p_rps10 <- plot_combined_facets(
  combined_rps10,
  rank = "Taxon",
  fill_col = "Taxon",         # <— names in legend
  reference_level = "Unmitigated",
  panel_labels = c("G","H","I"),
  min_prop = 0.01,
  show_ylab = FALSE, show_strip = FALSE,
  collapse_other = FALSE,
  legend_label = "Genus"
)

add_panel_labels <- function(plot, labels, has_yaxis = FALSE) {
  g <- ggplotGrob(plot)
  
  panels <- grep("panel", g$layout$name)
  
  for (i in seq_along(panels)) {
    panel_pos <- g$layout[panels[i], ]
    
    # Adjust x position: first panel of each row gets special treatment
    if (i == 1) {
      if (has_yaxis) {
        # D label - has y-axis text, needs most space
        x_pos <- unit(-44, "pt")
      } else {
        # A and G labels - no y-axis text but should still be left
        x_pos <- unit(-44, "pt")
      }
    } else {
      # B, C, E, F, H, I - other panels
      x_pos <- unit(-10, "pt")
    }
    
    label_grob <- textGrob(
      labels[i],
      x = x_pos,
      y = unit(1, "npc") - unit(-2, "pt"),  
      just = c("left", "top"),
      gp = gpar(fontsize = 13, fontface = "bold")
    )
    
    g <- gtable_add_grob(g, label_grob,
                         t = panel_pos$t, l = panel_pos$l,
                         clip = "off",
                         name = paste0("panel-label-", i))
  }
  
  return(g)
}

p_16S_labeled <- add_panel_labels(p_16S, c("A", "B", "C"), has_yaxis = FALSE)
p_ITS_labeled <- add_panel_labels(p_ITS, c("D", "E", "F"), has_yaxis = TRUE)
p_rps10_labeled <- add_panel_labels(p_rps10, c("G", "H", "I"), has_yaxis = FALSE)

library(grid)

white_spacer <- function() {
  grid::rectGrob(gp = grid::gpar(fill = "white", col = NA))
}

final_plot <- cowplot::plot_grid(
  p_16S_labeled,
  white_spacer(),  
  p_ITS_labeled,
  white_spacer(), 
  p_rps10_labeled,
  ncol = 1,
  rel_heights = c(1.15, 0.08, 1.15, 0.08, 1.15)
)

ggsave("Figures/Figure3_Relabundance_faceted.pdf", final_plot, 
       width = 8, height = 10.5, dpi = 600, bg = "white")
ggsave("Figures/Figure3_Relabundance_faceted.png", final_plot, 
       width = 8, height = 10.5, dpi = 600, bg = "white")
```

### Save finalized tables with min abund > 0
```{r final tables}
write_nonzero <- function(result_obj, path, min_abund = 0) {
  result_obj$data %>%
    dplyr::filter(Mean_Relative_Abundance > min_abund) %>%
    readr::write_csv(path)
}

write_nonzero(result_16S_trt,         "Results/16S/relabundance_table_16S_treatment_phylum_nowildfire.nonzero.csv")


write_nonzero(result_16S_trt_genus,    "Results/16S/relabundance_table_16S_treatment_genus_nowildfire.nonzero.csv")
write_nonzero(result_RPS10_trt_genus,  "Results/RPS10/relabundance_table_RPS10_treatment_genus_nowildfire.nonzero.csv")
```

### Software used
```{r, software used}
sessionInfo()
```
